projectDescription: An open-source, local-first AI meeting notetaker that records system audio, transcribes on-device, and generates AI summaries — with no cloud lock-in and no bots joining your calls.
keyFeatures: Bot-free system audio capture — records any meeting platform without joining as a participant
On-device local transcription using Whisper and other local models
Bring-your-own-LLM: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, OpenRouter, Ollama, LM Studio, Azure
Multiple STT providers: Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Soniox, Gladia, and more
Notes stored as plain Markdown files on disk — no vendor lock-in
AI-powered summary generation with customizable templates and sections
Calendar integration (Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, Outlook) for meeting-backed notes
Import from Granola and previous Hyprnote versions
Full-text search across all meeting notes
MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration for AI assistants
Custom transcription dictionary for domain-specific terms
Floating recording bar for minimal-distraction use
macOS-first desktop app built with Tauri (Rust + React)
publicApiSurface: Webhook events: note_created, note_updated, note_deleted, recording_started, recording_completed, transcription_ready
Plugin SDK: PluginModule, PluginContext, registerView, openTab, registerEvent, registerCleanup

Settings: autostart, auto_start_scheduled_meetings, auto_stop_meetings, floating_bar_enabled, show_app_in_dock, show_tray_icon, telemetry_consent, ai_language, spoken_languages, current_stt_provider, audio_retention, personalization_dictionary_terms
LLM providers: hyprnote (Anarlog cloud), lmstudio, ollama, openrouter, openai, cloudflare_workers_ai, anthropic, mistral, azure_openai, azure_ai, google_generative_ai, custom
STT providers: hyprnote, deepgram, assemblyai, openai, cartesia, cloudflare_workers_ai, gladia, soniox, elevenlabs, mistral, pyannote, aquavoice, fireworks, custom
Import sources: Granola, HyprnoteV0Stable, HyprnoteV0Nightly, AsIs
